payload.title: AI-enabled Climate Risk Digital Twins for Regions
payload.summary: Develop regional digital twins combining climate, infrastructure, and health indicators for adaptation planning.
payload.full_text: The call supports consortium projects that build AI-enabled climate risk digital twins, validate scenario simulation quality, and deliver operational adaptation decision support for municipalities.
eligibility_notes: At least 3 independent entities from 3 different eligible countries
Demonstration in at least two regions

payload.title: Federated AI for Preventive Public Health in Climate-sensitive Regions
payload.summary: Build privacy-preserving federated analytics for preventive care and heat-related risk forecasting.
payload.full_text: Projects should deliver federated machine learning pilots across hospitals and regional health agencies, with measurable reductions in response latency for climate-sensitive events.
eligibility_notes: Ethics and data governance plan mandatory

payload.title: AI and Data Skills Academies for Green Transition
payload.summary: Develop multilingual micro-credential pathways for AI/data skills supporting green transition sectors.
payload.full_text: The call funds alliances of universities, vocational providers, and regional innovation actors to deliver stackable AI and data skills curricula linked to climate transition jobs.
eligibility_notes: Consortium must include at least one VET provider
